title: NIT Rourkela develops multi-sensor AI system for accurate patient sleep posture detection
description: Speaking about the developed system, Prof. Saptarshi Chatterjee, Assistant Professor, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, NIT Rourkela, said, “Our system leverages generative AI along with a fusion technique combining low-wave infrared, depth, and pressure map data to detect sleeping postures without directly using RGB images.
